# Gallery

Reference output for every supported diagram type, rendered by this crate from the sources in [`samples/`](https://github.com/xmiksay/mermaid/tree/master/samples).

## Pie

<img alt="Pie diagram" style="max-width:100%;height:auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
